title: The Dangerous Age
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, J.G. Hawks, Bess Meredyth
actors: Lewis Stone, Cleo Madison, Edith Roberts
plot: Mary and John Emerson have been married for 22 years, and she treats him more like a son than a husband. Stung by her rebuffs, he succumbs to the youthful charms of Gloria Sanderson, whom he meets on a business trip. But just afte...
